HL7Messages.Message: MSH|^~\&|PATHL7|EXC-RV^LIFELABS ONTARIO|HTTPCLIENT||20260424175012-0400||ORU^R01|MDC20260424175012938|D|2.3.1|||AL PID|||||IRL NEW^5A^^^^^L||19930505|F|||||^H PV1|1|OU ORC|RE||26032EMR2605 OBR|1|26032EMR2605-0_TR10116-2R|26032EMR2605-0_TR10116-2R|TR10116-2R^Chloride Urine|||20260326153300|||||||20260326153300|UR&URINE&HL70070|LLON80808^MDCAREQA^BOB||||||||CHEM10|I|||LLON80808^MDCAREQA^BOB ORC|RE||26032EMR2605 OBR|2|26032EMR2605-0_TR10170-9ET|26032EMR2605-0_TR10170-9ET|TR10170-9ET^Drugs of Abuse Screen|||20260320134500|||||||20260320160500|UR&URINE&HL70070|LLON80808^MDCAREQA^BOB||||||20260407114123||CHEM20|F|||LLON80808^MDCAREQA^BOB OBX|1|ST|3349-8^Amphetamines||NOT DETECTED||||||F|||20260407114123-0400|5687^LifeLabs&100 International Blvd.&&Toronto&Ontario&M9W 6J6&Canada&B NTE|||Detection limit = 1000 ng/mL\.br\ \.br\This amphetamines screen does not detect\.br\methylphenidate.\.br\It can detect different classes of amphetamines,\.br\including Amphetamine, Methamphetamine, Ecstasy\.br\(MDMA), MDEA and MDA. OBX|2|ST|14316-4^Benzodiazepines||NOT DETECTED||||||F|||20260407114123-0400|5687^LifeLabs&100 International Blvd.&&Toronto&Ontario&M9W 6J6&Canada&B NTE|||Detection limit = 200 ng/mL\.br\ \.br\False positive results may be caused by high\.br\levels of sertraline.\.br\ \.br\Please note the new benzodiazepines screen has\.br\improved detection of clonazepam and lorazepam. OBX|3|ST|14314-9^Cocaine||DETECTED|||A|||F|||20260407114123-0400|5687^LifeLabs&100 International Blvd.&&Toronto&Ontario&M9W 6J6&Canada&B NTE|||Detection limit = 150 ng/mL OBX|4|ST|19295-5^Opiates||NOT DETECTED||||||F|||20260407114123-0400|5687^LifeLabs&100 International Blvd.&&Toronto&Ontario&M9W 6J6&Canada&B NTE|||Detection limit = 300 ng/mL\.br\ \.br\This opiate screen does not detect synthetic\.br\opioids (e.g. methadone, buprenorphine, fentanyl,\.br\tramadol, meperidine). Opiate screen can\.br\crossreact with high levels of oxycodone, and\.br\should be interpreted together with results of\.br\oxycodone-specific screen. OBX|5|ST|18282-4^Cannabinoids||NOT DETECTED||||||F|||20260407114123-0400|5687^LifeLabs&100 International Blvd.&&Toronto&Ontario&M9W 6J6&Canada&B NTE|||Detection limit = 50 ng/mL\.br\ \.br\This screen does not detect synthetic\.br\cannabinoids. OBX|6|ST|10998-3^Oxycodone||DETECTED|||A|||F|||20260407114123-0400|5687^LifeLabs&100 International Blvd.&&Toronto&Ontario&M9W 6J6&Canada&B NTE|||Detection limit = 100 ng/mL OBX|7|ST|59673-4^Fentanyl||DETECTED|||A|||F|||20260407114123-0400|5687^LifeLabs&100 International Blvd.&&Toronto&Ontario&M9W 6J6&Canada&B NTE|||Detection limit = 1 ng/mL OBX|8|ST|3414-0^Buprenorphine||DETECTED|||A|||F|||20260407114123-0400|5687^LifeLabs&100 International Blvd.&&Toronto&Ontario&M9W 6J6&Canada&B NTE|||Detection limit = 5 ng/mL OBX|9|FT|XON10442-2^Specimen Comment||\.br\Urine drug screen analysis was completed using\.br\immunoassay methods specific to the drug or drug\.br\class. Results are preliminary. If clinically\.br\indicated, please call LifeLabs 416-675-4530\.br\X 43339 to order urine Broad Spectrum Toxicology\.br\Screen for confirmation.\.br\\.br\Specimen collection and testing not completed\.br\using chain of custody processes. Results must be\.br\used for medical purposes only.||||||F|||20260407114123-0400|5687^LifeLabs&100 International Blvd.&&Toronto&Ontario&M9W 6J6&Canada&B OBX|10|ST|22745-4^Ethanol||DETECTED|||A|||F|||20260407114123-0400|5687^LifeLabs&100 International Blvd.&&Toronto&Ontario&M9W 6J6&Canada&B NTE|||Detection limit = 2 mmol/L\.br\ \.br\In diabetic patients, urine glucose can be\.br\converted to ethanol in vitro. For those\.br\patients, urinalysis testing for glucose in\.br\parallel with ethanol testing is suggested.\.br\ \.br\Specimen collection and testing not completed\.br\using chain of custody processes. Results must be\.br\used for medical purposes only.

There is no change in\.br\methodology as the new analyzer is IFA based.\.br\Screening titre for adults (>18 years old) is\.br\unchanged. Screening titre for pediatric\.br\patients is updated to 1:80.
